trich_yeu: V/v huong dan ke khai thue TNCN nam 2026
kinh_gui: Cac Chi cuc Thue khu vuc
Phong Thue thu nhap ca nhan
noi_dung:
De dam bao cong tac huong dan ke khai thue TNCN thong nhat, de nghi cac don vi trien khai theo noi dung dinh kem.
Trong qua trinh thuc hien neu co vuong mac, de nghi tong hop va gui ve CUC THUE TP. HA NOI de xu ly.
